detail.tip: Tempo composition that is best played from ahead. Best Psionic item = Malware Matrix on Yi. Related trait emblems are good: Marauder > Brawler = Psionic > Challenger.

augments.name: May The Fours Be With You

detail.tip: Always aim for 6 Dark Star. Late game if you lack AD items, prioritize: Jhin 2 > Kai'Sa 2 > Jhin 1. Level 7 and 8 are very flexible -- most common to play 4 Dark Star + Vanguards Shepherd (Illaoi / Meepsie) / Brawlers (Pantheon) / Rogues (Riven). Emblems are good: Dark Star > Sniper >> Voyager, Rogue, Tank.

Prioritize items on Briar > Bel'Veth / Kai'Sa. Positioning shown is for most of early and mid game, but late game you can play a standard default melee carry positioning. Rhaast on 8, Jhin on 9. Tahm 2 is a better tank than Reksai 3.

Best on Serpent = Mountain > Medallion >> Huntress > Boar Stargazer. If on Medallion, Lulu still prints gold on casts even if Stargazer is not active. Your tank will likely change every game depending on what's available / contested (Jax 3 > Maokai 3 > Pantheon 3). Horizon Focus Lulu on Mountain = insta top 2 hard force.

Play when you have lots of early copies of Teemo / Leona. Preferably choose a tanky or permanent HP scaling Arbiter trait for Leona. True BIS Leona is 3x Stoneplate but don't overgreed for it. Nasus 3 is nice, but not necessary.

Best on Altar > Serpent > Boar = Medallion = Mountain > Huntress. Item priority: Jax / TF > Talon > Caitlyn. Always tank Jax even if you have Jax 2 + Aatrox 3. 4 Fateweaver is a consideration if carrying Caitlyn and not Talon.

Use Timebreaker to push levels. Riven items are flexible, but make sure to have Sterak or IE or DB on her to activate AD form. DO NOT play Bard at lvl 8 over Voyager, add him on lvl 9 with Shen over Poppy. Fateweavers can inherently crit, but IE is still acceptable on Corki if your items end up that way.

Commonly you only play around either Vex / Graves but if highrolling hard or extremely rich you can play for both on your rolldown. Graves build: Assault frame -> Buckshot -> Choke -> Buckshot+ -> Buy whatever expensive upgrades available.

+1 tier in strength with Artifacts. IE is BIS even though Akali gives precision because it maxes Crit on Urgot. Position Urgot top left (A1) or top right (A7) as shown here. Can also play Urgot B1 / B7 if playing against melee carries. Tank items are flexible. If HP items, tank Maokai. Otherwise, tank Rhaast. But always put items on the one you 3star first.

augments.name: May The Fours Be With You

detail.tip: Only strong with with Boar, Serpent, and Altar Stargazers. Mountain is only good if you have Stargazer on 2-1. Medallion is C tier. Meeple package is flexible - can replace with 5 costs, TK + Brawler, or whatever frontline necessary to stall.

There are two ways to play this: Roll on 7 for Kai'Sa and Illaoi 3 / Rhaast 3 (either works as primary tank) or push levels with 2* and aim for Jhin cap with 5 costs (Sona > Lissandra). Karma is primary duo carry but if excess AD items look for Riven > Gwen.

This comp is played in two ways: Standard 1 cost reroll of slow rolling above 50 at levels 4/5 or push for 7 Meeple to print Veigar 3 (example: Worth the Wait Poppy). Then move down to 5 Meeple for the board once you finish 3* Veigar.
Only play this version with augment "Two Tanky". You can also go for alternative double tank if Ornn is too contested, such as Jax 3 + Jax 2 or two Nunus.
Play when you have lots of copies of Lissandra + good encounter / God boon for reroll (Varus). Dark Star emblem is good so you can 6 Dark Star on level 8.

Optimized version still being tested. Can also play for Zoe 3* or Challenger Miss Fortune 3* if you get excess sword / bow items and no Anima. Look for Arbiter that gives Resists or permanent HP per 3 attacks / 4 seconds / damage 10 times. Anima cash out is optional, but nice to hit extra copies of Illaoi / Aurora.

Best with Arbiter that scales Leblanc's AP or AS > 50 mana spent gain Permanent HP > gain copies of Leona. End game you can cap your board with Vex who holds Leblanc's items. Zoe 2 could be better than Karma 2 in some spots.

Ideally played with some special item (Anima cash out, Radiant item, 2+ Artifacts, etc) + Combat augment. Always keep everything in Mecha form. Can play Kench + Fiora/Yi instead of the N.O.V.A units (usually only with early kench 2).
Yasuo God Hex buffs can be very good for Cho'Gath. Ezreal and Cho'Gath permanently scales with takedowns so killing units early is good. Rush 4 Timebreaker after hitting to push levels.

Last 2 slots are highly flexible. Most common setup will be 4 Vanguard, but you can also play Bastions, 5 costs, Voyagers, etc. Always prioritize whoever you 2* first on the rolldown. Composition needs lots of items so prioritize item Gods / augments.

S tier Space Groove Emblem only. Space Groove emblem = cut Nasus for Nunu. Leftover items on Riven. Use Blitzcrank to displace the enemy primary tank so Riven can potentially wrap backline. Can also primary tank Ornn.

There is a strong Arbiter build with Deal damage 10 times -> Mana gain. If you have this, play the Ekko Patience Alt Build shown on Zoe for infinite casting loop. Otherwise, take 50 Mana Spent -> Shield > Copies of Leona > permanent HP. Can also play for Leblanc as the duo carry if you can't find Lissandra 3.

Must have Psionic Drone for Viktor. Best played with Bronze 4 Life augment since you have many active traits, but not mandatory. Nami / Lulu take leftover AP and utility items. Often you will be contested so level to 8 and play for 2* only -> aim for Top 4.

Situational comp played with Invader Zed augment. Zed can fit in a lot of comps as long as your frontline is strong (TK 2 + Maokai > Nunu 2 + Blitz). Zed is very good with Brawler or Meeple emblem (make sure to play 3+ Meeple).

Best with Arbiters that can print Leona so you can push levels and play a standard LeBlanc tempo board. Vex 2 / Bard 2 can replace backline Arbiters end game (especially if Leona print is your Arbiter since its irrelevant late game).

Gragas Hero Augment required. +1 tier in strength when played with Sympathetic Implant for Gragas. Also good with +1 Bruiser Emblem so you can fit 6 Bruiser / 4 Psionic quicker. Bruiser emblem goes on Yi. Pyke 3 is only worth chasing if you have excess items.

Don't reroll on low levels. Instead, use the 2 star to tempo win streak and finish printing the 3 star with 7 meeple -> go fast 9 and 10. Board shown is only the end game cap so it's important to flex Stage 4 with units like Mighty Mech + Meepsie.
Always aim for 6 Vanguard. If you can't hit Teemo 3, push levels for Leblanc instead. Preferably choose a tanky Arbiter trait. If you have Space Groove emblem, you can drop Leblanc for Nami.
If you don't have good Psionic item, replace with Edge of Night. Comp is flexible with number of Voyagers. Gragas 3 is not necessary since Brawler can be hard to fit unless you hit Tahm Kench.

Positioning is key to get the middle of the board open for Pyke to jump on enemy carries. Good with extra team slots to play more Voyagers. Can also play Viktor as duo carry if your Psionic item is good for him (Drone > Implant). Rhaast and Nami can go in on at 8.
Ideally played on 3* buff Stargazer. Always NOVA select Aatrox. Once you finish your core, push levels for NOVA or more Stargazer. NOVA provides Shred/Sunder built into trait.

Best on 3* buff Stargazer Constellation. Take lots of item and econ augments to hit the board. Many games you won't be able to fully itemize both TF and Caitlyn in the back so only prioritize one of them.

Mordekaiser Hero Augment required. Much stronger with Dark Star Emblem so consider taking things that give a Spatula. You can also duo carry Lissandra 3 > Karma if you find her rolling on 6. Leftover AD on Jhin.
